name: Body Fat Calculator
desc: Body Fat Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
seo_title: Body Fat Calculator – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free body fat calculator to quickly estimate grasa_hombre, grasa_mujer based on imc, edad. Not registration needed.
example_label: Calculatete body fat using US Navy method.
result_context: The percentage of grasa difiere per sexo due to diferencias biológicas; women tienen esencialmente more grasa.
formula_display: Grasa hombre = 1.20 × IMC + 0.23 × edad - 16.2; Grasa mujer = 1.20 × IMC + 0.23 × edad - 5.4
mistakes: Use calculated BMI with height incorrecta (propaga error)
Compare % grasa hombre with mujer (women tienen 10-12% more esencial)
Confiar ciegamente without Consider method of medición (DEXA is gold standard)
